zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Monbourcher於大約1369年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德霍頓時，她的父親Sir Bertram de Monbourcher of Horton Castle33歲，母親Christiana de Widdrington34歲。她於1388年與Henry de Heaton在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1426年10月23日在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德普雷斯頓享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Monbourcher于大约1369年出生在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德霍頓时，她的父亲Sir Bertram de Monbourcher of Horton Castle33岁，母亲Christiana de Widdrington34岁。她于1388年与Henry de Heaton在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1426年10月23日在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德普雷斯頓享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Monbourcher was born about 1369, in Horton, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Bertram de Monbourcher of Horton Castle, was 33 and her mother, Christiana de Widdrington, was 34. She married Henry de Heaton in 1388, in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died on 23 October 1426, in Preston, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 58.

fr.Preston, Yorkshire East Riding, England,: Preston, Yorkshire East Riding, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Monbourcher est née environ 1369, à Horton, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Bertram de Monbourcher of Horton Castle, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Christiana de Widdrington, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Henry de Heaton en 1388, à Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 23 octobre 1426, à Preston, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.Preston, Yorkshire East Riding, England,: Preston, Yorkshire East Riding, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Monbourcher um 1369 in Horton, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Bertram de Monbourcher of Horton Castle 33 und ihre Mutter Christiana de Widdrington 34. Sie hat 1388 in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom Henry de Heaton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 23. Oktober 1426 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Preston, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Monbourcher è nata il circa 1369 nel Horton, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Bertram de Monbourcher of Horton Castle, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Christiana de Widdrington, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato Henry de Heaton nel 1388, nel Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 23 ottobre 1426, nel Preston, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Monbourcherが約1369年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドホールトンで生まれた時，父Sir Bertram de Monbourcher of Horton Castleは33歳，母Christiana de Widdringtonは34歳であった。1388年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドでHenry de Heatonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1426年10月23日にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドプレストンで58歳で死去した。

ko.Preston, Yorkshire East Riding, England,: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 프레스턴
ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Monbourcher(이)가 대략 1369년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 호르턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Bertram de Monbourcher of Horton Castle(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Christiana de Widdrington(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1388년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드에서 Henry de Heaton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1426년 10월 23일 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 프레스턴에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.Preston, Yorkshire East Riding, England,: Preston, Yorkshire East Riding, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Monbourcher nasceu aproximadamente 1369, em Horton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Bertram de Monbourcher of Horton Castle, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Christiana de Widdrington, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry de Heaton em 1388, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 23 de outubro de 1426, em Preston, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 58 anos.

ru.Preston, Yorkshire East Riding, England,: престон, еркшир эаст ридинг, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Monbourcher родилась около 1369 г. в местности хауртон, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Bertram de Monbourcher of Horton Castle было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Christiana de Widdrington, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry de Heaton в 1388 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла 23 октября 1426 г. в местности престон, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel Monbourcher nació aproximadamente 1369, en Horton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Bertram de Monbourcher of Horton Castle, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Christiana de Widdrington, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Henry de Heaton en 1388, en Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 23 de octubre de 1426, en Preston, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 58 años.
